name: OpenClaw Teams Connector (Elvatis)
description: Microsoft Teams connector for OpenClaw Gateway. Bridges Teams channels to OpenClaw sessions with per-channel system prompts.

port.description: Port for Bot Framework webhook endpoint

appId.description: Microsoft App ID from Azure Bot registration

appPassword.description: Microsoft App Password from Azure Bot registration

appTenantId.description: Azure AD Tenant ID for single-tenant bots

channels.description: Per-channel configuration keyed by Teams channel name or ID
